name: symbol-operations
description: Symbol resolution, reference tracking, and safe renaming operations across the codebase

resolve_symbols.description: Resolve symbol definitions and find their source locations
resolve_symbols.output: definition location, type information, visibility scope
resolve_symbols.method: Use Grep with precise patterns for function/class/type definitions

track_references.description: Find all references to a symbol across the codebase
track_references.output: list of files and line numbers referencing the symbol
track_references.method: Use Grep with word-boundary matching, filter test vs production code

safe_rename.description: Rename a symbol across all files with reference updating
safe_rename.output: list of modified files with changes applied
safe_rename.method: Use Edit with replace_all after verifying all references via track_references
safety_checks: Verify no naming collisions with new name
Check for string literals that may contain the symbol name
Validate renamed code still compiles/passes linting

error_handling.symbol_not_found: Report symbol not found with suggestions for similar names
error_handling.ambiguous_symbol: List all matching definitions and ask for disambiguation
error_handling.rename_collision: Abort rename and report existing symbol with same name
error_handling.partial_rename_failure: Roll back all changes if any file fails to update

success_criteria.resolve: Symbol definition located with file path and line number
success_criteria.track: All references found including imports, usages, and re-exports
success_criteria.rename: All references updated, code compiles, no naming collisions
